raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to echo date and time then " 1". Append to file. Use date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' maybe. Command: echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') 1" >> /system/folder3/temp/empty.txt. Also print to console: echo ... ; also append. Could use tee -a. But requirement: write to console and append to file. So: echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') 1" | tee -a /system/folder3/temp/empty.txt. That prints and appends. Provide that.
